description: Linear is a product development and issue-tracking platform for planning roadmaps, managing projects, and tracking software work. It provides workspace data and actions around issues, projects, comments, agents, and related workflow objects.
summary: Linear exposes a GraphQL API at `api.linear.app`, a hosted MCP server at `mcp.linear.app/mcp`, and a `linear` CLI; developer auth is via Linear-issued personal API keys and OAuth applications/tokens.
